select.expr: calculated from PatientHospitalMH based on TreatmentRecordDateTime
substring(''MAN  TRT  TRT  PORT IMAGEIMAGE'', (5 * RVFlag + isnull(10 * (CONVERT(int, ascii(PFFlag) / ascii(PFFlag))), 0) + isnull(15 * (CONVERT(int, ascii(PIFlag) / ascii(PIFlag))), 0)) +1,5)
Static value as 0 or 1 depending on TreatmentRecordDatetime and PatientSer
CASE WHEN PatientType='DeletedPatient' THEN  1 ELSE 0 END
Case When '''+@ConfigValue+'''=''cGy'' then ROUND(dm.DeliveredFieldDose * 100.0, 1) ELSE ROUND(dm.DeliveredFieldDose,3)  END

CASE WHEN df.SetupFieldFlag=1 Then NULL ELSE CASE aol.LimitPrecision      WHEN 0 THEN cast(cast(fth.FieldMUActual as decimal(38,0)) as varchar)     WHEN 1 THEN cast(cast(fth.FieldMUActual as decimal(38,1)) as varchar)    WHEN 2 THEN cast(cast(fth.FieldMUActual as decimal(38,2)) as varchar)      ELSE fth.FieldMUActual END END

Replace(ltrim(rtrim(Replace(ISNULL(AddOnId1,'''')+'',''+ ISNULL(AddOnId2,'''')+'',''+ ISNULL(AddOnId3,'''')+'',''+ ISNULL(AddOnId4,'''')+'',''+ ISNULL(AddOnId5,'''')+'',''+ ISNULL(AddOnId6,'''')+'',''+ ISNULL(AddOnId7,'''')+'',''+ ISNULL(AddOnId8,'''')+'',''+ ISNULL(AddOnId9,'''')+'',''+ ISNULL(AddOnId10,''''),'','',''  ''))),''  '','','')
CASE WHEN dbo.PatientActuals.InPatientFlag = 1 THEN 'In' ELSE 'Out' END

CASE WHEN df.SetupFieldFlag=1 Then NULL ELSE CASE pol.LimitPrecision                  WHEN 0 THEN cast(cast(df.PlannedMu as decimal(38,0)) as varchar)                  WHEN 1 THEN cast(cast(df.PlannedMu as decimal(38,1)) as varchar)                   WHEN 2 THEN cast(cast(df.PlannedMu as decimal(38,2)) as varchar)                  ELSE fth.PlannedMU END  END

SELECT CASE WHEN     @nRadiationSer IS NULL                    AND @nActualMU >= @nPlannedMU                   THEN 'Treated'              WHEN     @nRadiationSer IS NOT NULL                   AND (SELECT MURounded FROM PlanPrivate.vf_syMURounded(@nRadiationSer, @nActualMU)) >= (SELECT MURounded FROM PlanPrivate.vf_syMURounded(@nRadiationSer, @nPlannedMU))                   THEN 'Treated'  WHEN @nActualMU = 0                   THEN 'Active'              ELSE 'Pt. Treated'         END as TreatmentStatus

CASE WHEN rh.TreatmentDeliveryType IN ('OPEN_PORTFILM', 'TRMT_PORTFILM')              AND  rh.TerminationStatus IN ('MACHINE')              THEN 0 -- returning 0 here will handle PIMG with MU Subtraction as partial            WHEN     rh.TreatmentDeliveryType IN ('OPEN_PORTFILM', 'TRMT_PORTFILM')             THEN 1         ELSE 0 END as IsImage
dbo.Patient.LastName + CASE WHEN dbo.Patient.FirstName IS NOT NULL THEN ', ' + ISNULL(dbo.Patient.FirstName,'') ELSE '' END
CASE WHEN Doctor.FirstName IS NOT NULL THEN ', ' + Doctor.FirstName END

CASE aol.LimitPrecision                  WHEN 0 THEN cast(cast(fth.DeliveredMU as decimal(38,0)) as varchar)                  WHEN 1 THEN cast(cast(fth.DeliveredMU as decimal(38,1)) as varchar)                   WHEN 2 THEN cast(cast(fth.DeliveredMU as decimal(38,2)) as varchar)                  ELSE fth.DeliveredMU END       END

ISNULL(CASE WHEN @SiteLng='FRA' THEN dl_Gender.LookupDescriptionFRA   WHEN @SiteLng='ESN' THEN dl_Gender.LookupDescriptionESN                   WHEN @SiteLng='CHS' THEN dl_Gender.LookupDescriptionCHS                   WHEN @SiteLng='DEU' THEN dl_Gender.LookupDescriptionDEU                   WHEN @SiteLng='JPN' THEN dl_Gender.LookupDescriptionJPN                   WHEN SiteLng='PTB' THEN dl_Gender.LookupDescriptionPTB                   WHEN @SiteLng='SVE' THEN dl_Gender.LookupDescriptionSVE                   WHEN @SiteLng='ITA' THEN dl_Gender.LookupDescriptionIT   END,dl_Gender.LookupDescriptionENU)

ltrim(rtrim(substring(''MAN  TRT  TRT  PORT IMAGEIMAGE'', (5 * fth.RVFlag + isnull(10 * (CONVERT(int, ascii(fth.PFFlag) / ascii(fth.PFFlag))), 0) + isnull(15 * (CONVERT(int, ascii(fth.PIFlag) / ascii(fth.PIFlag))), 0)) + 1, 5)))
Case When @ConfigValue='cGy' then fth.DoseDeliveredPerFraction* 100.0 ELSE fth.DoseDeliveredPerFraction END
Case When '''+@ConfigValue+'''=''cGy'' then ROUND(dc.DoseDelivered* 100.0, 1) ELSE ROUND(dc.DoseDelivered,3) END  AS ActualDoseInCourse,
Case When '''+@ConfigValue+'''=''cGy'' then ROUND(rm.CourseDosePlanned* 100.0, 1) ELSE ROUND(rm.CourseDosePlanned,3) END   AS PlannedDoseInCourse,
CASE WHEN PatientType='DeletedPatient' THEN  1 ELSE 0 END

CASE WHEN ActualMachineScale = 'VAR' THEN (100.0 + fth_CouchLatIso) WHEN ActualMachineScale IN ('VAR_IEC','SATURNE') THEN (CASE WHEN fth_CouchLatIso < 0.0 THEN (1000.0 + fth_CouchLatIso) ELSE (fth_CouchLatIso) END) WHEN ActualMachineScale IN ('ABB_IEC','ELEKTA_IEC','ELEKTA') THEN (CASE WHEN fth_CouchLatIso < 0.0 THEN (100.0 + fth_CouchLatIso) ELSE (fth_CouchLatIso) END) ELSE fth_CouchLatIso END

CASE WHEN ActualMachineScale = 'VAR' THEN (100.0 - fth_CouchVrtIso) WHEN ActualMachineScale IN ('VAR_IEC','ABB_IEC','SATURNE','ELEKTA_IEC') THEN (CASE WHEN fth_CouchVrtIso > 0.0 THEN (1000.0 - fth_CouchVrtIso) ELSE (-1.0* fth_CouchVrtIso) END) WHEN ActualMachineScale = 'ELEKTA' THEN (CASE WHEN fth_CouchVrtIso > 0.0 THEN (100.0 - fth_CouchVrtIso) ELSE (-1.0* fth_CouchVrtIso) END)ELSE fth_CouchVrtIso END

CASE when ActualMachineScale='VAR' THEN (CASE WHEN fth_GantryRtn > 180.0 THEN (540.0- fth_GantryRtn) ELSE (180.0 - fth_GantryRtn) END ) 
				ELSE  fth_GantryRtn	END
dbo.Patient.LastName + CASE WHEN dbo.Patient.FirstName IS NOT NULL THEN ', ' + ISNULL(dbo.Patient.FirstName,'') ELSE '' END
CASE WHEN dbo.PatientActuals.InPatientFlag = 1 THEN 'In' ELSE 'Out' END
CASE WHEN Doctor.FirstName IS NOT NULL THEN ', ' + Doctor.FirstName END

ISNULL(CASE WHEN @SiteLng='FRA' THEN dl_Gender.LookupDescriptionFRA WHEN @SiteLng='ESN' THEN dl_Gender.LookupDescriptionESN  WHEN @SiteLng='CHS' THEN dl_Gender.LookupDescriptionCHS  WHEN @SiteLng='DEU' THEN dl_Gender.LookupDescriptionDEU  WHEN @SiteLng='JPN' THEN dl_Gender.LookupDescriptionJPN  WHEN @SiteLng='PTB' THEN dl_Gender.LookupDescriptionPTB  WHEN @SiteLng='SVE' THEN dl_Gender.LookupDescriptionSVE  WHEN @SiteLng='ITA' THEN dl_Gender.LookupDescriptionITA  END,dl_Gender.LookupDescriptionENU)
CASE WHEN dbo.Patient.ClinicalTrialFlag=0 THEN 'No' ELSE 'Yes' END
CASE WHEN dbo.PatientActuals.InPatientFlag = 1 THEN 'In' ELSE 'Out' END

ISNULL(CASE WHEN @SiteLng='FRA' THEN dl_PatientStatus.LookupDescriptionFRA WHEN @SiteLng='ESN' THEN dl_PatientStatus.LookupDescriptionESN WHEN @SiteLng='CHS' THEN dl_PatientStatus.LookupDescriptionCHS WHEN @SiteLng='DEU' THEN dl_PatientStatus.LookupDescriptionDEU WHEN @SiteLng='JPN' THEN dl_PatientStatus.LookupDescriptionJPN WHEN @SiteLng='PTB' THEN dl_PatientStatus.LookupDescriptionPTB WHEN @SiteLng='SVE' THEN dl_PatientStatus.LookupDescriptionSVE WHEN @SiteLng='ITA' THEN dl_PatientStatus.LookupDescriptionITA END,dl_PatientStatus.LookupDescriptionENU)

ISNULL(CASE WHEN @SiteLng='FRA' THEN DiagnosisClinicalDescriptionFRA WHEN @SiteLng='ESN' THEN DiagnosisClinicalDescriptionESN WHEN @SiteLng='CHS' THEN DiagnosisClinicalDescriptionCHS WHEN @SiteLng='DEU' THEN DiagnosisClinicalDescriptionDEU WHEN @SiteLng='JPN' THEN DiagnosisClinicalDescriptionJPN WHEN @SiteLng='PTB' THEN DiagnosisClinicalDescriptionPTB WHEN @SiteLng='SVE' THEN DiagnosisClinicalDescriptionSVE WHEN @SiteLng='ITA' THEN DiagnosisClinicalDescriptionITA END,DiagnosisClinicalDescriptionENU)

ISNULL(CASE WHEN @SiteLng='FRA' THEN dc.DiagnosisTableFRA WHEN @SiteLng='ESN' THEN dc.DiagnosisTableESN WHEN @SiteLng='CHS' THEN dc.DiagnosisTableCHS WHEN @SiteLng='DEU' THEN dc.DiagnosisTableDEU WHEN @SiteLng='JPN' THEN dc.DiagnosisTableJPN WHEN @SiteLng='PTB' THEN dc.DiagnosisTablePTB WHEN @SiteLng='SVE' THEN dc.DiagnosisTableSVE WHEN @SiteLng='ITA' THEN dc.DiagnosisTableITA END,dc.DiagnosisTableENU)

SELECT count(*)  FROM [Session] s  JOIN SessionRTPlan srtp ON srtp.SessionSer = s.SessionSer  JOIN RTPlan rtp ON rtp.RTPlanSer = srtp.RTPlanSer  JOIN PlanSetup ps ON ps.PlanSetupSer = rtp.PlanSetupSer  AND ps.CourseSer = c.CourseSer  AS NoTxSessionPlanned

(SELECT count(*)  FROM [Session] s  JOIN SessionRTPlan srtp ON srtp.SessionSer = s.SessionSer  AND srtp.Status IN ('TREAT', 'INACTIVE_TREAT', 'RESUME', 'INACTIVE_RESUME')  JOIN RTPlan rtp ON rtp.RTPlanSer = srtp.RTPlanSer  JOIN PlanSetup ps ON ps.PlanSetupSer = rtp.PlanSetupSer  AND ps.CourseSer = c.CourseSer  )  AS NoTxSessionRemaining
Case When '''+@ConfigValue+'''=''cGy'' then ROUND(rm.DosePerFraction * 100.0, 1) ELSE  ROUND(rm.DosePerFraction,3)  END
(SELECT pv.PatientVolumeId FROM PatientVolume pv JOIN RefPoint rp  ON rp.PatientVolumeSer = pv.PatientVolumeSer  AND rp.RefPointSer = dfa.RefPointSer  AND dfa.PrimaryFlag = 1 )  AS 'VolumeId'
Case When '''+@ConfigValue+'''=''cGy'' then ROUND(pm.PrimaryRefPointDelivered* 100.0, 1) ELSE ROUND(pm.PrimaryRefPointDelivered,3) END  AS ActualDose
Case When '''+@ConfigValue+'''=''cGy'' then ROUND(pm.PrimaryRefPointPlanned* 100.0, 1) ELSE ROUND(pm.PrimaryRefPointPlanned,3) END  AS PlannedDose
Case When '''+@ConfigValue+'''=''cGy'' then ROUND(pm.PrimaryRefPointRemaining* 100.0, 1) ELSE ROUND(pm.PrimaryRefPointRemaining,3) END  AS RemainingDose
Case When '''+@ConfigValue+'''=''cGy'' then ROUND(pm.PrimaryRefPointDeliveredSum* 100.0, 1) ELSE ROUND(pm.PrimaryRefPointDeliveredSum,3) END  AS ActualDoseInPlanChain
Case When '''+@ConfigValue+'''=''cGy'' then ROUND(pm.PrimaryRefPointRemainingSum* 100.0, 1) ELSE ROUND(pm.PrimaryRefPointRemainingSum,3) END  AS RemainingDoseInPlanChain
Case When '''+@ConfigValue+'''=''cGy'' then ROUND(pm.PrimaryRefPointPlannedSum* 100.0, 1) ELSE ROUND(pm.PrimaryRefPointPlannedSum,3) END  AS PlannedDoseInPlanChain

(SELECT count(*)  FROM [Session] s  JOIN SessionRTPlan srtp ON srtp.SessionSer = s.SessionSer  WHERE srtp.RTPlanSer = dfa.RTPlanSer  AND srtp.[Status] IN ('TREAT', 'INACTIVE_TREAT', 'RESUME', 'INACTIVE_RESUME') )  AS 'NoSessionRemaining'

(SELECT STUFF((SELECT' / ' + CONVERT(varchar, em.Energy) + em.RadiationType  FROM Radiation r  JOIN ExternalFieldCommon efc  ON efc.RadiationSer = r.RadiationSer  JOIN EnergyMode em  ON em.EnergyModeSer = efc.EnergyModeSer  WHERE r.PlanSetupSer = dfa.PlanSetupSer  FOR XML PATH('')) , 1, 3, '') )  AS 'EnergyMode'

CASE WHEN fm.SetupFieldFlag=1 Then NULL ELSE CASE ol.LimitPrecision  WHEN 0 THEN cast(cast(fm.PlannedMu  as decimal(38,0)) as varchar)  WHEN 1 THEN cast(cast(fm.PlannedMu  as decimal(38,1)) as varchar)  WHEN 2 THEN cast(cast(fm.PlannedMu as decimal(38,2)) as varchar) ELSE fm.PlannedMu END END
CASE WHEN dfa.PrimaryFlag = 1 THEN dfa.RefPointSer ELSE NULL END
(SELECT SUM(FractionsDelivered) FROM #PlanSummaryApp WHERE CourseSer = c.CourseSer  ) AS NoTxSessionDelivered
Case When '''+@ConfigValue+'''=''cGy'' then ROUND(cm.DoseDelivered* 100.0, 1) ELSE  ROUND(cm.DoseDelivered,3) END
(SELECT rp.RefPointId  FROM RefPoint rp  WHERE rp.RefPointSer = dfa.RefPointSer  AND dfa.PrimaryFlag = 1  ) AS 'PrimaryRefPointId'
CASE WHEN PatientType='DeletedPatient' THEN  1 ELSE 0 END
IF ExportedDateTime IS NOT  NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0

WHEN ExportedDateTime is not null THEN 'Exported' WHEN (ReviewedBy.UserId is not null OR ReviewedBy.UserId <>'NA') THEN 'Reviewed' WHEN CompletedDateTime is not null THEN 'Completed' ELSE '' END AS ActivityBillingStatus,
CASE WHEN PatientType='DeletedPatient' THEN  1 ELSE 0 END
CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE,AppointmentDateTime,ActivityStartDateTime)>= 0 THEN CAST(DATEDIFF(MINUTE,AppointmentDateTime,ActivityStartDateTime) AS NVARCHAR(10))   ELSE ''-'' END
CASE WHEN PatientType='DeletedPatient' THEN  1 ELSE 0 END
WHEN FactCourseDiagnosisID is null THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y'
CASE WHEN PatientType='DeletedPatient' THEN  1 ELSE 0 END
CASE WHEN PatientType='DeletedPatient' THEN  1 ELSE 0 END
CASE WHEN PatientType='DeletedPatient' THEN  1 ELSE 0 END
